ai-firewall.short: Wire AI clients to the Vulnetix AI Firewall and manage its policy

ai-firewall baseline.short: Show the guardrails the server recommends

ai-firewall export.short: Write the org's current policy to a policy file

ai-firewall get.short: Show the org's providers, model lists, and guardrails

ai-firewall install.short: Wire the AI clients on this machine to the gateway

ai-firewall key.short: Store this org's provider API keys (BYOK)

ai-firewall key remove.short: Remove this org's stored key for a provider

ai-firewall key set.short: Store or replace the provider API key for this org

ai-firewall policy.short: Provider, model, and guardrail rules the gateway enforces

ai-firewall policy guardrail.short: Create, update, or delete a content guardrail

ai-firewall policy model.short: Add or remove a model allow/deny entry

ai-firewall policy provider.short: Allow, deny, or clear a provider for this org

ai-firewall snippet.short: Print ready-to-run code wired to the gateway

ai-firewall status.short: Show what is wired to the gateway, and where it conflicts with policy

ai-firewall uninstall.short: Remove the AI Firewall configuration from local clients

aibom.short: Discover AI coding agents and AI usage, and emit a CycloneDX AIBOM

analyze.short: Build the repository's tech-stack graph and its evidence-backed metrics

cbom.short: Discover cryptographic usage and emit a CycloneDX CBOM with PQC posture

config get ai-firewall.short: Show AI Firewall providers, model lists, and guardrails

config get eol-policy.short: Show the org-wide EOL severity quality gate

config get package-firewall.short: Show Package Firewall policy and mirrors

config get quality-gate.short: Show the org-wide CLI scan quality-gate enforcement policy

config set ai-firewall.short: Configure AI Firewall providers, model lists, and guardrails

config set ai-firewall guardrail.short: Create, update, or delete a content guardrail

config set ai-firewall model.short: Add or remove a model allow/deny entry

config set ai-firewall provider.short: Allow, deny, or clear a provider for this org

config set eol-policy.short: Set the org-wide EOL severity quality gate

config set package-firewall.short: Set Package Firewall policy and mirrors

config set quality-gate.short: Set the org-wide CLI scan quality-gate enforcement policy

gha upload.short: Upload GitHub Actions artifacts to Vulnetix

iac.short: Run only Infrastructure as Code (IaC) analysis

license.short: Analyze package licenses for conflicts and policy compliance

malscan.short: Scan local dependency install dirs for malware (malscan-engine, in-process)

package-firewall alpine.short: Configure Alpine to use Vulnetix Package Firewall

package-firewall aur.short: Configure Arch Linux to use Vulnetix Package Firewall

package-firewall cargo.short: Configure Cargo to use Vulnetix Package Firewall

package-firewall chef.short: Configure Chef to use Vulnetix Package Firewall

package-firewall composer.short: Configure Composer to use Vulnetix Package Firewall

package-firewall conan.short: Configure Conan to use Vulnetix Package Firewall

package-firewall conda.short: Configure Conda to use Vulnetix Package Firewall

package-firewall cran.short: Configure CRAN to use Vulnetix Package Firewall

package-firewall debian.short: Configure Debian / Ubuntu to use Vulnetix Package Firewall

package-firewall docker.short: Configure Docker / OCI to use Vulnetix Package Firewall

package-firewall gem.short: Configure RubyGems to use Vulnetix Package Firewall

package-firewall go.short: Configure Go to use Vulnetix Package Firewall

package-firewall go-dev.short: Configure pkgsite-cli to use Vulnetix Package Firewall

package-firewall helm.short: Configure Helm to use Vulnetix Package Firewall

package-firewall hex.short: Configure Hex to use Vulnetix Package Firewall

package-firewall homebrew.short: Configure Homebrew to use Vulnetix Package Firewall

package-firewall julia.short: Configure Julia to use Vulnetix Package Firewall

package-firewall maven.short: Configure Maven to use Vulnetix Package Firewall

package-firewall npm.short: Configure npm to use Vulnetix Package Firewall

package-firewall nuget.short: Configure NuGet to use Vulnetix Package Firewall

package-firewall pub.short: Configure pub.dev to use Vulnetix Package Firewall

package-firewall pypi.short: Configure PyPI to use Vulnetix Package Firewall

package-firewall rpm.short: Configure RPM to use Vulnetix Package Firewall

package-firewall terraform.short: Configure Terraform to use Vulnetix Package Firewall

sast.short: Run only Static Application Security Testing (SAST) scan

sca.short: Run only Software Composition Analysis (SCA) scan

scan.short: Scan local manifests for vulnerabilities (local analysis, no upload)

skills install.short: Install Vulnetix skills for supported agents

triage.short: Triage vulnerabilities using GitHub alerts or Vulnetix VDB

update.short: Update Vulnetix CLI to the latest version

vdb.short: Interact with the Vulnetix Vulnerability Database (VDB) API

vdb advisories.short: Get advisory data for a vulnerability (V2)

vdb affected.short: Get affected products/packages for a vulnerability (V2)

vdb attack-techniques.short: Look up MITRE ATT&CK technique mappings for CVEs

vdb attack-techniques get.short: Get the ATT&CK technique mapping for a single CVE

vdb attack-techniques list.short: Search ATT&CK technique mappings across CVEs

vdb cache.short: Manage the local VDB response cache

vdb cache clear.short: Remove all cached VDB API responses

vdb cloud-locators.short: Get cloud resource locator templates for a vendor/product (V2)

vdb cwe guidance.short: Get CWE-based guidance for a vulnerability (V2)

vdb ecosystem package.short: Get package information within an ecosystem

vdb exploit-trends.short: Severity-tier rollup of exploit signal counts

vdb exploits.short: Get exploit intelligence for a specific vulnerability

vdb exploits archived.short: List Exploit-table rows for a CVE with hasArchive flag

vdb exploits download.short: Download every archived PoC for a CVE into a directory

vdb exploits poc.short: Download a single archived PoC by Exploit UUID

vdb exploits search.short: Search exploits across CVEs with filters and pagination

vdb fixes.short: Get fix data for a specific vulnerability

vdb fixes distributions.short: List supported Linux distributions for fix advisories

vdb gcve issuances.short: List GCVE issuance identifiers by calendar month

vdb ids.short: List CVE identifiers published in a calendar month

vdb iocs.short: IOC pivots from CrowdSec sightings + Shadowserver counts

vdb iocs get.short: IOC sightings + Shadowserver summary for a single CVE

vdb kev.short: Access the Vulnetix KEV (Known Exploited Vulnerabilities) catalogue

vdb kev download.short: Download the Vulnetix KEV catalogue as CSV (alias for `list --format csv`)

vdb kev get.short: Get a single Vulnetix KEV entry by CVE ID

vdb kev list.short: List the full Vulnetix KEV catalogue (JSON or CSV)

vdb kev reasons.short: List valid Vulnetix KEV qualifying-reason enum values

vdb kev sources.short: List the four KEV sources surfaced by the API

vdb msrc.short: Microsoft Security Response Center patch-tuesday rollups

vdb msrc patch-tuesday.short: Get a specific Patch Tuesday rollup by ISO month

vdb msrc patch-tuesdays.short: List Microsoft Patch Tuesday months on file

vdb nuclei get.short: List or fetch nuclei template bodies for a CVE

vdb purl.short: Query VDB using a Package URL (PURL)

vdb raw.short: Replay raw archived advisory bytes from object storage

vdb raw get.short: Fetch a CVE's raw upstream advisory bytes from S3

vdb raw sources.short: List sources whose raw archives are retrievable

vdb sightings.short: Merged in-the-wild observation timeline for a CVE

vdb snort-rules.short: Look up Snort detection rules with rich filters

vdb snort-rules get.short: Get all Snort rules linked to a single CVE

vdb snort-rules list.short: Search Snort rules across all CVEs with expressive filters

vdb status.short: Check API health and display CLI metadata

vdb traffic-filters.short: Get IDS/IPS traffic filter rules (Snort) for a vulnerability

vdb triage.short: Score-driven triage feed (the daily SOC pull)

vdb vendor-trends.short: Vendor trend data — monthly/yearly CVE+GHSA breakdown

vdb versions.short: Get all versions of a package across ecosystems

vdb vex get.short: VEX statements declared for a single CVE

vdb vex list.short: Search VEX statements (filter by status, supplier, since)

vdb vuln.short: Get information about a specific vulnerability

vdb workarounds.short: Get workaround information for a vulnerability (V2)

vdb yara-rules.short: Look up YARA static-analysis rules with rich filters

vdb yara-rules get.short: Get all YARA rules linked to a single CVE

vdb yara-rules list.short: Search YARA rules across all CVEs with expressive filters

version.short: Print the version number of Vulnetix CLI
